name: KwikClick, Inc.
summary: KwikClick, Inc., (the Company) was organized pursuant to the laws of the State of Delaware on November 16, 1993. Beginning in 2020, the Company commenced its KwikClick business operations to allow sellers to make products or services available on the KwikClick platform, at Kwik.com, offering a self-determined discount on goods or services in exchange for exposure and substantially increased sales volume. Competition We directly or indirectly compete with online resellers across the Internet. Man...
